name: Potential LOLBIN Activity
notes: This rule triggers when LOLBIN is used to execute code for a specified binary.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Dotnet.exe Exec Dll and Execute Unsigned Code LOLBIN
BB:BehaviorDefinition: WinDbg/CDB LOLBIN Usage and Application Whitelisting Bypass via Dxcap.exe
BB:BehaviorDefintion: Lolbin PressAnyKey and Download Activity
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: WinDbg/CDB LOLBIN Usage and Application Whitelisting Bypass via Dxcap.exe, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Dotnet.exe Exec Dll and Execute Unsigned Code LOLBIN, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Squirrel Lolbin, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Windows Update Client LOLBIN, BB:BehaviorDefintion: Lolbin PressAnyKey and Download Activity
TD_list: APPLY Potential LOLBIN Activity on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: WinDbg/CDB LOLBIN Usage and Application Whitelisting Bypass via Dxcap.exe, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Dotnet.exe Exec Dll and Execute Unsigned Code LOLBIN, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Squirrel Lolbin, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Windows Update Client LOLBIN, BB:BehaviorDefintion: Lolbin PressAnyKey and Download Activity
RED_list: Event description: Detects when LOLBIN is used to execute code for a specified binary.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
